title: Descriptive
description: Customize your in-game name with (basically) no limits!
body:
![Descriptive](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6e1bad1d4b5c8179be9fac082f91908792218b05.png) [![Email](https://img.shields.io/badge/Contact-EA4335?style=for-the-badge&logo=gmail&logoColor=white)](mailto:contact@knochenn.de) [![Support on Ko-Fi](https://img.shields.io/badge/Support%20on%20Ko--fi-FF5E5B?style=for-the-badge&logo=ko-fi&logoColor=white)](https://ko-fi.com/knochennmc) [![Source](https://img.shields.io/badge/View%20Source-181717?style=for-the-badge&logo=github&logoColor=white)](https://github.com/DevKnochen/Descriptive) [![License](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-Apache%202.0-blue?style=for-the-badge)](https://github.com/DevKnochen/Descriptive/blob/main/LICENSE) ### Why have a boring white name when you could have _**this**_? ![Descriptive in Action](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/C9EtSpDt/images/8d53436abc3c540359a6e38549581563c37f3ba9.gif) *Colors. Formatting. Animations. Your name, your style.* **⚠️ Project is now in Beta! Expect some bugs. ⚠️**
--- ## 🎨 Pick your color, any color 🟦 **Solid** — RGB sliders + live hex input. Fine tune your color to your liking. 🌈 **Rainbow** — Animated, cycling through every color. 🎨 **Gradient** — Two colors blended together. --- ## ✍️ Make it ~~highlighted~~ Stack any combination of: **Bold** · *Italic* · Underline · ~~Strikethrough~~ Yes, you can select all four at once. --- ## 🎬 Add some movement | Animation | How it looks | |---|---| | 🏀 **Bounce** | ![Bounce Animation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/680dffb34eaa6a34d9d3f9cfb825e85f4c938c56.gif) | | 🌊 **Wave** | ![Wave Animation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/37c70ab5d7f75cabd04a02aa0061ffcca8d3e03c.gif) | | ⚡ **Glitch** | ![Glitch Animation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8bec40a758ba3c1ea446e673485cd909c9d8b797.gif) | | 🕰️ **Pendulum** | ![Pendelum Animation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e3a1f6a50af16e2cf008cd610f80b1a3e2d3e892.gif) | | 💓 **Pulse** | ![Pulse Animation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c1d8b1614057bd22e6d213979163bcbe2e610afa.gif) | | 😵 **Shake** | ![Shake Animation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2447bca7903d2eccce2952df6d4ee6e4858a5f40.gif) | | 🎷 **Swing** | ![Swing Animation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e72e8b4ce99689d40c4b8d5b14c5b813db50bc20.gif) | | 🌀 **Turbulence** | ![Turbulence Animation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5183b04d5ab363aa536d3285b4e6f860eee31002.gif) | | 〰️ **Wiggle** | ![Wiggle Animation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d05fb222da0a6cdd640d41484eb1b29a95c7203b.gif) | | 🌅 **Fade** | ![Fade Animation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e899f7863c53eb7091d0cd0040527c46f6325013.gif) | Pick one animation, stack a few together, or enable them all. It's entirely up to you. Fine-tune how fast everything plays with the speed slider. Anywhere from a 0.1× speed to an unhinged 5.0× speed. --- ## ✅ Works in Multiplayer **Here's how it works:** - **Server has Descriptive installed** — your styled name is shown to everyone automatically, no extra setup needed. - **Vanilla or unmodded server** — Descriptive will ask if you want to connect to an external relay server so other Descriptive users can still see your name. **This connection is opt-in**, you can enable this function in the **Descriptive Settings** > **Toggle Relay...** Menu. --- ## 📥 Getting started ### 🎮 Minecraft Client 1. Download **Descriptive** and the [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api). 2. Drop it in your `mods/` folder 3. Boot up Minecraft 4. Launch a world, press `U` or type `/descriptive config` and go customize! ### 🖥️ Minecraft Server 1. Download **Descriptive** 2. Drop it in your server's `mods/` or `plugins/` folder 3. Start the server. You can allow or disallow players to use the mod in the `descriptive-server.toml` file > ⚠️ Only download from [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/plugin/descriptive). Don't trust random sites! --- ## 🐛 Something broken? Open an issue on [GitHub](https://github.com/DevKnochen/Descriptive/issues). Describe your issue, include what version you're on, what other mods you have and any crash logs. We'll sort it out. --- ## 📩 Contact Reach out to us at contact@knochenn.de ---
*Enjoyed it? A ❤️ on Modrinth or a ⭐ on GitHub genuinely makes our day.*
